title: Silhouette Premium Vinyl
excerpt: Even though I have had it for quite some time now, it wasn't until the other day that I pulled out the Vinyl starter kit. Instead of creating wall art, I decided to add it to a little box (originally…
body:
Even though I have had it for quite some time now, it wasn't until the other day that I pulled out the Vinyl starter kit. Instead of creating wall art, I decided to add it to a little box (originally housing chocolates but now I use it for photos) and my mom's mini iPad. I got a turquoise roll of premium vinyl, which is the perfect shade of blue.

I'm already scouring the place for more items that "need" a little vinyl love. Yesterday I posted a little Vine showing the application here.

Visit Silhouette and use the promo code: TANGERINE through April 26th to get any of these: (1) 1 Silhouette Portrait™ + 1 roll of black vinyl, 1 roll of white vinyl, and 1 roll of transfer paper: $139.99 (2) 1 Silhouette CAMEO® + 1 roll of black vinyl, 1 roll of white vinyl, and 1 roll of transfer paper: $269.99 (3) All premium vinyl bought outside of a machine bundle is 25% off

If you haven't caved just yet, perhaps this is a good time - these are some great products! Please click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through April 26th.

Once again, Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette Portrait™!

GIVEAWAY: Open to U.S. residents only - To enter, just leave a comment with what you would cut from the vinyl and what you would stick it on! Giveaway will close on Saturday, April 20th at 8am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after. Good luck everyone! UPDATED: GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED. The winner is #90: Ilissa says: April 18, 2013 at 6:45 pm

I’d cut a bunch of cute stuff for my daughters binder and our window as decals!!

CONGRATS Ilissa! Please send us your mailing address so we can pass it along to Silhouette.

Remember you can still use the discount code TANGERINE through April 26th!
